# Notes

Who submitted?
Give them a round of applause
This is a fail first curriculum - relish in your failure and just submit it
Perfection is your enemy in this class
I need you to be fully in this next unit without worrying about the last one. There will be time to catch up later.
Review discussion
What is the biggest lesson you learned?
What didn’t work?
What lessons did you learn from failures?
What did work?
What will you do in the future to keep those successes? Write it down?
Big reveal
You made a BAD agent!
True course structure
Overarching goals
AI Use
You can use AI now, but you probably won’t need to a whole lot for unit 2
Talk in your groups about what you learned from not using AI for programming
This Unit
We will answer the big question of “Why was your agent bad?”
Diagnostics through LangSmith
Give a light tour of LangSmith
It gives a better way to peer into the black box
